languages.text: {n}Недовольно надутый Эоганн кривит губы.{/n} "Признаться, Ферренц, я ожидал от коллеги с вашим опытом и умом больше компетентности. Я могу понять неспособность разобраться в тонком устройстве моего дражайшего спутника, но ваш отказ признать нехватку навыков и попытки прикрыть это вопиющими заявлениями, о том, что он не нуждается в ремонте..."

{n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"
languages.original_text: {n}Недовольно надутый Эоганн кривит губы.{/n} "Признаться, Ферренц, я ожидал от коллеги с вашим опытом и умом больше компетентности. Я могу понять неспособность разобраться в тонком устройстве моего дражайшего спутника, но ваш отказ признать нехватку навыков и попытки прикрыть это вопиющими заявлениями, о том, что он не нуждается в ремонте..."

I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"

{n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn masculla, descontento e irritable.{/n} «Debo admitir, Ferrenz, que esperaba más competencia de un colega con su experiencia e intelecto. Acepto que sea incapaz de comprender el delicado funcionamiento de mi compañero, pero su negativa a reconocer su carencia de habilidad y sus intentos de camuflarlo con proclamaciones falaces según las cuales opera perfectamente...».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn masculla, descontento e irritable.{/n} «Debo admitir, Ferrenz, que esperaba más competencia de un colega con su experiencia e intelecto. Acepto que sea incapaz de comprender el delicado funcionamiento de mi compañero, pero su negativa a reconocer su carencia de habilidad y sus intentos de camuflarlo con proclamaciones falaces según las cuales opera perfectamente...».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡暴躁地皱起眉头。{/n}“不得不说，费伦茨，我本期望一个有你这般经验和智力的同僚会展现出更高的水平。你不能理解我最亲密同伴的精密运作，我尚可接受；但你拒绝承认你技能上的缺陷，并试图用他‘工作状态完美’的荒谬断言来掩盖这一事实——”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡暴躁地皱起眉头。{/n}“不得不说，费伦茨，我本期望一个有你这般经验和智力的同僚会展现出更高的水平。你不能理解我最亲密同伴的精密运作，我尚可接受；但你拒绝承认你技能上的缺陷，并试图用他‘工作状态完美’的荒谬断言来掩盖这一事实——”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn manifeste son mécontentement en fronçant les sourcils d'un air irrité.{/n} « En toute franchise, Ferrenz, je m'attendais à ce qu'un collègue de votre expérience et de votre intellect soit plus compétent. J'admets que vous êtes incapable de comprendre le fonctionnement complexe de mon très cher compagnon, mais ce n'est pas une raison pour refuser de reconnaître vos lacunes et tenter de les dissimuler en affirmant de façon si éhontée qu'il est en parfait état de marche... »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn manifeste son mécontentement en fronçant les sourcils d'un air irrité.{/n} « En toute franchise, Ferrenz, je m'attendais à ce qu'un collègue de votre expérience et de votre intellect soit plus compétent. J'admets que vous êtes incapable de comprendre le fonctionnement complexe de mon très cher compagnon, mais ce n'est pas une raison pour refuser de reconnaître vos lacunes et tenter de les dissimuler en affirmant de façon si éhontée qu'il est en parfait état de marche... »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, asabi bir hoşnutsuzlukla kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "İtiraf etmeliyim ki Ferrenz, senin kadar tecrübeli ve zeki bir meslektaşımdan daha yetkin olmasını beklerdim. Pek değerli yoldaşımın hassas işleyişini anlayamadığını kabul ediyorum ama beceri eksikliğini kabullenmeyi reddetmen ve bu gerçeği onun kusursuz çalıştığına dair asılsız iddialarla gizlemeye çalışman..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, asabi bir hoşnutsuzlukla kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "İtiraf etmeliyim ki Ferrenz, senin kadar tecrübeli ve zeki bir meslektaşımdan daha yetkin olmasını beklerdim. Pek değerli yoldaşımın hassas işleyişini anlayamadığını kabul ediyorum ama beceri eksikliğini kabullenmeyi reddetmen ve bu gerçeği onun kusursuz çalıştığına dair asılsız iddialarla gizlemeye çalışman..."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn macht ein missmutiges Gesicht.{/n} "Ich muss zugeben, Ferrenz, dass ich von einem Kollegen mit Eurerm Erfahrung etwas mehr Kompetenz erwartet hätte. Mir ist klar, dass Ihr die komplexe Funktionsweise meines geschätzten Gefährten nicht versteht, aber Eure Weigerung, Euer Fähigkeitsdefizit zu akzeptieren, und Eure Versuche, dies mit der unerhörten Behauptung, er wäre voll funktionsfähig, zu verschleiern ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"

Mir ist klar, dass Ihr die komplexe Funktionsweise meines geschätzten Gefährten nicht versteht, aber Eure Weigerung, Euer Fähigkeitsdefizit zu akzeptieren, und Eure Versuche, dies mit der unerhörten Behauptung, er wäre voll funktionsfähig, zu verschleiern ..."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは不機嫌そうに眉をひそめた。{/n}「フェレンツ、私は君のような経験と知性のある同僚には、もっと高い能力を期待していた。私の大切な仲間の繊細な働きを理解できないことは認めますが、自分の技術不足を認めようとせず、彼は完璧に作動しているという法外な主張でその事実を覆い隠そうとするあなたの姿勢は......」。
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn scowls in testy displeasure.{/n} "I must admit, Ferrenz, I expected greater competence from a colleague of your experience and intellect. I accept that you are unable to understand the delicate workings of my dearest companion, but your refusal to acknowledge your skill deficit and your attempts to disguise the fact with outrageous claims that he is in perfect working order—"
